items.title: Andre Drummond is the last Sixers FA standing with any form of Bird rights.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Andre Drummond is the last Sixers FA standing with any form of Bird rights.

Philly could’ve very well matched this and stayed below the hard cap.

Only questions now are whether they use the remainder of their MLE money or the bi-annual, or just sign minimums.

items.title: Andre Drummond: I'm not willing to play for less than my worth
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Andre Drummond: I'm not willing to play for less than my worth HoopsHype

items.title: Andre Drummond reflects on being a free agent:
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Andre Drummond reflects on being a free agent:
"It's a dream come true for me [playing in the NBA]. But I'm also not willing to play for less than my worth." 

"I did that once...and I think it really killed my value, because I'm still moving like I'm in my mid-20s."

www.youtube.com/watch?v=Biwm...
